relationships.description: ISO 10015 Engagement and motivation implements ISO 9000 Engagement of people principle by providing specific guidance on fostering engagement through development opportunities.
ISO 10015 Developing competence supports ISO 9001 Support requirements (Clause 7), specifically competence and awareness requirements.
ISO 10015 Evaluating competence development maps to ISO 9001 Performance evaluation. Both address monitoring, measurement, and evaluation of system effectiveness.
ISO 10015 People development implements ISO 31000 Human and cultural factors principle by providing systematic approaches to developing people's competence in risk management.
ISO 10015 Determining competence needs supports ISO 27001 People controls by providing methodology for identifying and addressing security competence requirements.
ISO 10015 competence development methods support NIST SP 800-53 AT-2 Literacy Training and Awareness by providing structured approaches for training delivery.
ISO 10015 Determining required competence supports NIST SP 800-53 AT-3 Role-Based Training by providing methodology for identifying role-specific competence requirements.
ISO 10015 Developing competence supports ISO 42001 Support requirements for AI management systems, specifically competence development for AI practitioners.
ISO 10015 Knowledge management relates to ISO 9000 Process approach. Capturing and sharing organizational knowledge supports process-based quality management.
